scripts.build: node -c main.cjs && node -c preload.cjs && node -c remote-support-agent.cjs && node -c forge.config.cjs && node --check scripts/build-runtime.mjs
scripts.package: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/generate-windows-icon.ps1 && electron-forge package --platform win32 --arch x64
scripts.make: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/generate-windows-icon.ps1 && electron-forge make --platform win32 --arch x64
scripts.typecheck: node -c main.cjs && node -c preload.cjs && node -c remote-support-agent.cjs && node -c forge.config.cjs && node --check scripts/build-runtime.mjs
